---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Z-Guard
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I am frustrated when I try to run Z-Guard in Fastify and have to write custom wrappers."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or mockups about the feature request here.
